finding_results.notes: Replaced the repetitive atmospheric descent with an on-page consequence chain: Gavin refuses a concrete resistance task, forces Miren to cover the slot herself, and then deliberately triages schoolwork in favor of the manuscript.
finding_results.summary: The ending now turns Gavin's resolve into immediate social and institutional cost instead of restating the school-routine-versus-wards contrast.

finding_results.notes: Added a new common-room aftermath scene and a dormitory triage beat that deepen the chapter engine and bring the final word count to 5840 while preserving the heading contract.
finding_results.summary: Chapter length now exceeds the 5000-word minimum with added causal material tied directly to Gavin's decision.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_13.md:151-239 contains the common room dialogue scene. Gavin speaks 11 lines across this span. Contractions appear in lines with contraction opportunity: "Couldn't" (chapters/chapter_13.md:153), "I can't" (chapters/chapter_13.md:187), "It's" (chapters/chapter_13.md:193), "I'm" (chapters/chapter_13.md:205). Self-correction at chapters/chapter_13.md:193 where Gavin starts a deflection ("It's —"), stops, and pivots to admission ("yeah. Because of that"). Hedge at chapters/chapter_13.md:229 ("Some of them"). Miren's syntax is declarative and question-driven with escalating pressure, clearly distinct from Gavin's hedged, minimal register. Duncan's lines are brief, deflective, and socially textured in a different mode. Pressure traces: Sprout note creates a practical obligation (chapters/chapter_13.md:167-175), Miren covers Gavin's rota slot herself (chapters/chapter_13.md:207-209), and the unresolved question of whether Gavin will do anything people ask carries forward as social cost (chapters/chapter_13.md:225-233).
finding_results.notes: The prior revision pass had already expanded the snapshot's silent common room re-entry (snapshot lines 129-143) into a full dialogue scene with Miren, Duncan, and two younger Hufflepuffs. This pass added a single targeted self-correction to Gavin's line at the manuscript-admission moment (line 193), where he starts to deflect ('It's —'), catches himself, and concedes ('yeah. Because of that'). This completes the acceptance test's self-correction requirement while preserving the scene's existing alive texture. No other changes were needed — the dialogue was already character-separated, contracted, hedged, and pressure-traced.

The chapter now leans on observed texture ('hard pinpricks,' 'yeasty and warm') instead of the metaword 'specific,' and the repeated 'Not X. Y.' emphasis pattern has been broken into assertions better matched to each paragraph's pressure.
finding_results.summary: Localized prose copyedits removed repeated diction and cadence tics while preserving the chapter's cosmic-horror pressure and Gavin-close voice.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 13 now carries Gavin's tower resolve into a concrete breakfast/common-room consequence, sets up the Chapter 14 academic fallout, and finishes at 5840 words.

One finding (MEDIUM severity) addressed with a single targeted edit. The chapter's common room scene (lines 151-239) already provided extensive dialogue testing Gavin's public register against Miren and Duncan during his re-entry after the Astronomy Tower night. The scene was well-constructed with distinct character voices, contraction-appropriate speech, hedging, and multiple pressure traces. The one gap — no clear self-correction in Gavin's lines — was filled by revising line 193 from a clean admission ('Because of that') to a false-start-then-admission ('It's — yeah. Because of that'), which matches the style bible's description of Gavin's frequent self-correction tendency and his inability to evade when directly pinned. All five acceptance-test criteria now pass.
Addressed the packet's single prose finding with local line-level revisions in chapter_13 and recorded the result as fixed.
